header.notifNewOrderDesc: POS-1 order has successfully completed payment

dashboard.title: Branch Operations Report
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of actual sales data, POS order volume, and store material inventory status today.
dashboard.errorLoad: Failed to load report from Backend API.

orders.title: Order Management
orders.subtitle: List and status workflow of branch orders.
orders.waitingBEDesc: The Order Management functionality has not been linked to the database and Backend API yet. Please check back later.

shifts.title: Shifts & Attendance
shifts.subtitle: Track weekly roster scheduling of baristas and actual check-in/check-out logs at the store.
shifts.waitingBEDesc: The Shifts & Attendance functionality has not been linked to the database and Backend API yet. Please check back later.

revenue.title: Branch Revenue
revenue.subtitle: Statistical report of total retail revenue via the branch's POS counter.
revenue.waitingBEDesc: The Branch Revenue functionality has not been linked to the database and Backend API yet. Please check back later.

reports.title: Branch Statistical Reports
reports.subtitle: Statistical reports of performance, shift attendance, and revenue at the store.

staff.title: Branch Employees
staff.subtitle: List of employees, baristas, and cashiers assigned to direct operations at the branch.

balance.subtitle: Track actual inventory levels of raw materials at the branch and make adjustments.
balance.loadingError: Failed to load inventory from Backend API.
balance.toastValidQty: Please enter a valid stock quantity.
balance.toastRestockError: Failed to adjust stock via Backend API.

history.title: Stock Movement History
history.subtitle: Detailed log of all stock imports, sales exports, and manual stock balance adjustments.

importNotes.title: Goods Import Receipts
importNotes.subtitle: Manage list of goods receipts from suppliers for the branch.
importNotes.toastMinRow: Goods receipt must contain at least one ingredient row.
importNotes.toastInvalidItems: Quantity and unit price of ingredients must be greater than 0.
importNotes.toastLoadDetailError: Failed to load goods receipt details.
importNotes.toastCompleteSuccess: Successfully completed and added to stock for receipt {code}!
importNotes.toastFillCode: Please fill in the receipt code.
importNotes.toastLoadError: Failed to load goods receipts list from server.
importNotes.modalPlaceholderNote: E.g.: Restock coffee and condensed milk for July week 1
importNotes.confirmCompleteMsg: Are you sure you want to complete goods receipt {code}? This will add stock levels directly and cannot be undone.
importNotes.confirmDeleteMsg: Are you sure you want to delete goods receipt {code}? NOTE: This action permanently deletes this draft.
